About.title: About Ganga Agro Industries
About.lead: Manufacturer of havan & puja essentials from Jodhpur, Rajasthan.
About.story: Established in 2002 as a proprietorship in Jodhpur, Ganga Agro Industries (house brand Ammedi) manufactures hawan samagri, mango-wood samidha, pooja items, incense & dhoop, sandalwood powder and biomass briquettes. We supply wholesale buyers across India with consistent quality and dependable delivery.
